title: savepoint-cli emit --recurse-submodules: multi-repo fan-out for mono + dirty submodules
description: Today savepoint-cli emit only addresses the cwd's git repo. The substrate's submodule layout makes the common case 'mono + N dirty submodules' (lived through repeatedly in this session's commits). --recurse-submodules should: enumerate nested git repos from cwd, find which have uncommitted changes (`git status --porcelain` non-empty), emit one CommitRequestModel per dirty repo, submit them to savepointd serially (v0.1) or in parallel (after v0.2 event-bus dispatch lands). Report the N TriggerImprints back.
